query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.establishmentId FROM products p JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.establishmentId HAVING COUNT(cg.id) > 0 LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.establishmentId FROM products p JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.establishmentId HAVING COUNT(cg.id) > 0 LIMIT 10;
